title: Sonic CD Music Replacement - 1 - Palmtree Panic [REDONE!]
description:
I decided to redo this one because it SUCKED HARD.

Music List:
Title Screen: Sonic CD JP Title Screen
Present: Donkey Kong Barrel Blast - Jungle Level 1
Bad Future: Super Smash Bros. Brawl - Tetris type B
Good Future: Super Mario Sunshine - Ricco Harbor
Speed Shoes: Sonic X opening
Invincibility: Sonic Adventure DX - Open Your Heart
Stage Clear: Super Smash Bros. Brawl - Sonic's victory theme
Special Stage: Mario Kart Wii - SNES Battle Course 4
